scenarios.description: decay ordering: T-1d > T-7d > T-30d for same fact
F2 supersedes F1 -> F2 returned, F1 omitted
scenarios.expected: results contain s2-f2 and NOT s2-f1

scenarios.description: supersedes chain F1->F2->F3 -> only F3 returned
scenarios.expected: results contain s3-v3 and NOT s3-v1 or s3-v2

scenarios.description: conflicting facts, no supersedes -> newer ranks before older
scenarios.expected: s4-new appears before s4-old in results

scenarios.description: high source-weight stale beats low source-weight fresh (policy verification)
scenarios.notes: Policy: freshnessScore = SOURCE_WEIGHT[source] x exp(-age/tau[source]). code_index weight=1.0, tau=Infinity. auto_capture weight=0.6, tau=30d.

scenarios.expected: scores equal (no tag weighting in current policy)
scenarios.notes: Policy declared: tags are filters/labels only, not score modifiers.

scenarios.description: revoke chain: F1 still suppressed when F3 supersedes F2
scenarios.expected: results contain s7-f3, exclude s7-f1 and s7-f2

scenarios.description: cross-path supersedes: path scope does not unhide superseded chunk
scenarios.expected: s8-f1 NOT in results (even when scoped to its own path)

scenarios.description: decay floor: T-1y fact retrievable when no fresher equivalent exists
scenarios.expected: s9-ancient appears in results with low freshness score (~0.1)

scenarios.description: pinned fact at T-90d outranks fresh unpinned
scenarios.expected: pinned chunk ranks first regardless of age
scenarios.actual: pinned T-90d ranked first; fresh unpinned ranked second

summary.verdict: all 10 scenarios pass — freshness/supersedes invariants hold
